2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch adds a new helper function called `inode_lease_ignore_mask` to the Linux kernel's filelock module. The function returns a mask of all directory change events that are currently ignored by any leases on a given inode. This is useful for NFSd, which will use this information to configure the fsnotify_mark mask. The patch introduces a new routine that walks through the list of leases associated with an inode and ors together their ignored event flags. The function is exported as a GPL symbol.
